name: Military, Police & Emergency Services
description: You've been trained to think about how systems fail under pressure, how adversaries exploit gaps, and how to plan for the worst case. AI safety needs exactly that operational mindset.
trajectory: Threat assessment and adversarial thinking map directly to AI red-teaming and threat modelling.
Decision-making under extreme uncertainty connects to AI control and containment — ensuring systems behave safely in unpredictable conditions.
Operational planning for worst-case scenarios is catastrophic risk assessment — a core practice in AI safety.
The field is full of people who've never stress-tested anything outside a laptop. Your operational experience fills a critical gap.

projects.title: Threat model an AI system
projects.description: Pick an AI system and write three ways it could be exploited or fail catastrophically, drawing on your operational experience.

projects.title: Cross-domain safety analysis
projects.description: Write about what AI safety can learn from how the military thinks about risk, adversaries, and worst-case planning.

projects.title: Build AI deployment threat models
projects.description: Help develop threat models for AI deployment scenarios in critical infrastructure, drawing on emergency services experience.
